sample_requests: Convert the OmicVerse alignment notebook into a reusable skill
Build a kb reference and quantify single-cell FASTQs with OmicVerse

smoke_commands.name: synthetic-kb-alignment
smoke_commands.command:
${PYTHON} - <<'PY'
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
import pathlib
import tempfile

import anndata as ad
import numpy as np
import scanpy as sc

import omicverse as ov

kb_script = """#!/usr/bin/env python3
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
import pathlib
import sys

import anndata as ad
import numpy as np

args = sys.argv[1:]
mode = args[0]
log_path = pathlib.Path(os.environ['KB_LOG'])
log_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
with log_path.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as handle:
    handle.write(json.dumps(args) + '\\n')

if mode == 'ref':
    index_path = pathlib.Path(args[args.index('-i') + 1])
    t2g_path = pathlib.Path(args[args.index('-g') + 1])
    index_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    t2g_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    index_path.write_text('index\\n', encoding='utf-8')
    t2g_path.write_text('t2g\\n', encoding='utf-8')
    sys.exit(0)

if mode == 'count':
    output_path = pathlib.Path(args[args.index('-o') + 1])
    output_path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    adata = ad.AnnData(X=np.array([[1.0, 2.0], [3.0, 4.0]], dtype=float))
    adata.obs_names = ['cell1', 'cell2']
    adata.var_names = ['gene1', 'gene2']
    adata.write_h5ad(output_path / 'adata.h5ad')
    (output_path / 'matrix.mtx').write_text('%%MatrixMarket matrix coordinate real general\\n2 2 1\\n1 1 1\\n', encoding='utf-8')
    (output_path / 'barcodes.tsv').write_text('cell1\\ncell2\\n', encoding='utf-8')
    (output_path / 'genes.tsv').write_text('gene1\\tgene1\\ngene2\\tgene2\\n', encoding='utf-8')
    sys.exit(0)

sys.exit(2)
"""

with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
    root = pathlib.Path(td)
    bin_dir = root / 'bin'
    inputs = root / 'inputs'
    ref_std = root / 'outputs' / 'ref_std'
    ref_nuc = root / 'outputs' / 'ref_nuc'
    count_out = root / 'outputs' / 'count'
    bulk_out = root / 'outputs' / 'bulk'
    for path in (bin_dir, inputs, ref_std, ref_nuc, count_out, bulk_out):
        path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    kb_path = bin_dir / 'kb'
    kb_path.write_text(kb_script, encoding='utf-8')
    kb_path.chmod(0o755)

    (inputs / 'ref.fa').write_text('>tx1\nACGT\n>tx2\nTGCA\n', encoding='utf-8')
    (inputs / 'ref.gtf').write_text(
        'chr1\tsrc\tgene\t1\t4\t.\t+\t.\tgene_id "g1"; transcript_id "tx1";\n'
        'chr1\tsrc\tgene\t5\t8\t.\t+\t.\tgene_id "g2"; transcript_id "tx2";\n',
        encoding='utf-8',
    )
    (inputs / 'read_R1.fastq').write_text('@r1\nACGT\n+\n!!!!\n', encoding='utf-8')
    (inputs / 'read_R2.fastq').write_text('@r1\nTGCA\n+\n!!!!\n', encoding='utf-8')

    os.environ['PATH'] = f"{bin_dir}:{os.environ['PATH']}"
    os.environ['KB_LOG'] = str(root / 'calls.log')

    ref_info = ov.alignment.single.ref(
        index_path=str(ref_std / 'index.idx'),
        t2g_path=str(ref_std / 't2g.txt'),
        fasta_paths=str(inputs / 'ref.fa'),
        gtf_paths=str(inputs / 'ref.gtf'),
    )
    ref_nuc_info = ov.alignment.single.ref(
        index_path=str(ref_nuc / 'index.idx'),
        t2g_path=str(ref_nuc / 't2g.txt'),
        fasta_paths=str(inputs / 'ref.fa'),
        gtf_paths=str(inputs / 'ref.gtf'),
        workflow='standard',
        nucleus=True,
    )
    count_info = ov.alignment.single.count(
        index_path=str(ref_std / 'index.idx'),
        t2g_path=str(ref_std / 't2g.txt'),
        technology='10XV3',
        fastq_paths=[str(inputs / 'read_R1.fastq'), str(inputs / 'read_R2.fastq')],
        output_path=str(count_out),
        h5ad=True,
        filter_barcodes=True,
    )
    try:
        ov.alignment.single.count(
            index_path=str(ref_std / 'index.idx'),
            t2g_path=str(ref_std / 't2g.txt'),
            technology='BULK',
            fastq_paths=str(inputs / 'read_R1.fastq'),
            output_path=str(bulk_out),
            filter_barcodes=True,
        )
    except ValueError as exc:
        bulk_error = str(exc)
    else:
        bulk_error = None

    calls = [json.loads(line) for line in pathlib.Path(os.environ['KB_LOG']).read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines()]
    count_h5ad = count_info.get('h5ad_file')
    summary = {
        'ref_workflow': ref_info['workflow'],
        'ref_nucleus_workflow': ref_nuc_info['workflow'],
        'ref_index_exists': pathlib.Path(ref_info['index_path']).exists(),
        'ref_t2g_exists': pathlib.Path(ref_info['t2g_path']).exists(),
        'count_h5ad_exists': pathlib.Path(count_h5ad).exists() if count_h5ad else False,
        'count_matrix_exists': pathlib.Path(count_info['matrix_file']).exists() if 'matrix_file' in count_info else False,
        'count_shape': list(sc.read_h5ad(count_h5ad).shape) if count_h5ad else None,
        'bulk_error': bulk_error,
        'ref_args_has_workflow': '--workflow' in calls[0],
        'count_args_has_filter': '--filter' in calls[2] if len(calls) > 2 else False,
        'count_args_has_h5ad': '--h5ad' in calls[2] if len(calls) > 2 else False,
    }
    print(json.dumps(summary, sort_keys=True))
PY
